zh.name: 彭斯诚
zh.introduction: 多年前端开发经验，近两年深耕 AI 工程化领域。以 React、TypeScript、Node.js 为核心全栈技术栈，具备 NestJS 后端开发能力。在 AI 应用层有丰富的工程落地经验：基于 LangGraph 设计多 Agent 协作架构，自建 RAG 检索系统支撑智能推荐与知识库查询，集成 Function Calling 构建可扩展的 Agent 工具生态，并通过 SSE 实现实时流式交互。擅长从 0 到 1 交付复杂系统，将 AI 能力与业务场景深度结合。

en.name: Sicheng Peng
en.introduction: Nearly 10 years of full-stack development experience with a deep focus on AI engineering in the past two years. Core full-stack stack: React, TypeScript, Node.js, and NestJS. Extensive AI application engineering experience: designed multi-agent collaboration architectures with LangGraph, built RAG retrieval systems with vector databases for intelligent recommendation and knowledge base queries, integrated Function Calling to build extensible Agent tool ecosystems, and delivered real-time streaming interaction via SSE. Proven ability to deliver complex systems from zero to one and deeply integrate AI capabilities with business scenarios — verified results include 40+ MAU and 300+ monthly conversations on the AI assistant platform.
